title: SWORD Escapes Pirate Island
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, York, Shiryu, Kuzan, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9 as Garp and SWORD fight the Blackbeard Pirates on Hachinosu while Koby’s rescue becomes a turning point for the next generation of Marines.
scene: Garp and SWORD fight the Blackbeard Pirates on Hachinosu while Koby’s rescue becomes a turning point for the next generation of Marines.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is nothing!! Go to the ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was in his sights the whole time!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Garp's vulnerable!! We might be able to take him out now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Killing him is an instant ticket to wealth and glory!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's got a three crown bounty, the same as an Admiral!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You guys wouldn't stand a chance...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Even if we bound both his arms and legs!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Take you on as a disciple?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Go learn from one of the navy's in- structures!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They've taught me all they can. I'm ready for the next level!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I couldn't use it even if I wanted to...

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: My son became a revolutionary!! Dammit!!

summary: This part advances the Garp’s Last Stand at Hachinosu through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
